name: Felix Neumann
description:
Two Birds On A Wire

(Felix×Fem!Case)

While Felix didn't seem to want to do much with Case after going to the Bio-Tech facility, they were still apart of the team. The restless nights and yelling in her sleep caused Case to low on energy, not to mention, after learning about the cradle, she was doing more to suppress the violent urges. One day, Felix sees her looking out into the sea, it was clear she needed help.
creator: tamaki2737
